title: Meeting a New Friend
audioScript: Hello! My name is Anna. What is your name? Nice to meet you. Where are you from? I am from Canada.

exercises.prompt: Dengarkan audio dan ketikkan nama orang tersebut.

title: Ordering Coffee
audioScript: I would like a large coffee, please. And a piece of chocolate cake. Thank you. How much is that?

title: Daily Schedule
audioScript: I wake up at six in the morning. I take a shower and eat breakfast at seven. Then I go to work.

exercises.hint_id: Dengarkan kata yang mengikuti 'I wake up at...'.
Dengarkan kata yang mengikuti 'eat breakfast at...'.

title: Asking for Directions
audioScript: Excuse me, where is the train station? Oh, it is straight ahead. Just walk for five minutes. Thank you!

title: Weekend Plans
audioScript: This weekend, I want to go to the beach. I will swim in the sea and eat ice cream. It will be fun.

exercises.prompt: Ke mana dia ingin pergi akhir pekan ini?
exercises.hint_id: Dengarkan kalimat pertama: 'I want to go to...'.

exercises.prompt: Apa yang akan dia makan di sana?
